task: Make Day 1 AI tool chips selectable

governance_bootstrap.summary: Completion requires evidence-backed reporting, entrypoint verification, and completion evidence guard for code, UI, deploy, and customer-facing answer changes.
Mac Mini production changes require source-of-truth deploy flow, real user entrypoint verification, and completion evidence guard before reporting complete.

changes: Changed Day 1 AI tool chips from display-only spans into clickable buttons.
Clicking ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, Genspark, or Grok sends preferred_llm through session sync and reloads Day 1 with the selected tool highlighted.
Backend session sync now only changes preferred_llm when the request explicitly sends a value, avoiding accidental default resets.
Backend rebuilds Day 1 practice content when preferred_llm changes while preserving completion state, saved result, checked steps, questions, answers, and feedback.
Added regression coverage for preferred_llm changes rebuilding the Day 1 install guide and preserving saved work.

verification.name: frontend production build
verification.result: passed: tsc and vite built dist/assets/index-DImRapPE.js

verification.name: full edu VP training flow tests
Mac Mini scoped deploy
verification.target: Mac Mini source and backend service
verification.result: passed: backend relaunched on port 8000 and deployed paths diff origin/main = 0

verification.name: Mac Mini edu-app production build
verification.target: Mac Mini dist and launchd service
verification.command: ssh macmini 'cd harness-os/edu-app && npm run build && launchctl kickstart -k gui/$(id -u)/com.harness.edu-app'
verification.result: passed: dist/index.html points to dist/assets/index-CPvihuyS.js and service listens on port 5174

verification.name: Mac Mini frontend bundle clickability check
verification.command: grep production dist bundle for preferred_llm_changed, 변경 중, ChatGPT, Gemini, Genspark, Grok

verification.name: Mac Mini entrypoint check
verification.command: curl backend on 127.0.0.1:8000 and edu-app on http://100.97.175.44:5174/
verification.result: passed: backend_http=200, edu-app HTML references index-CPvihuyS.js

residual_risk: A browser tab with an older cached JS bundle may need a hard refresh to fetch index-CPvihuyS.js.
